features.name: AI-Powered Research Assistant
features.description: Interactive chat interface for querying PDF knowledge base with context-aware responses.

features.name: Multimodal PDF Workspace
features.description: Support for text and visual content within PDFs for comprehensive research.

features.name: Subject Indexing & Library Catalog
features.description: Automatic categorisation and indexing of PDFs by subject for easy discovery.
features.notes: Enhanced with source tracking and preservation logic.

features.name: Token Usage & Spend Monitoring
features.description: Real-time tracking of API usage and estimated costs in GBP £.

features.name: Intelligence Drawer & Canvas
features.description: Rich-text workspace for assembling research findings with a 'view content' toggle.

features.name: Citation Mapping
features.description: Direct links from AI responses to specific pages and sections in source PDFs.

features.name: Google OAuth Authentication
features.description: Secure access restricted to authorised admin accounts via Google Login.

features.name: Print & Export
features.description: Ability to print or export research findings from the rich-text editor.

features.name: Tone Selection
features.description: Customise the AI's response style (Friendly, Professional, Direct, Investigator).

features.name: AI Image Generation
features.description: Generate high-fidelity research visualisations directly from chat prompts using Imagen 4.0.

features.name: Enhanced Subject Preservation
features.description: Distinguish between folder-sourced and AI-sourced subjects with persistent tracking.

features.name: Mobile UX Stability & Layout Grounding
features.description: Cross-device stability for chat interface and status bar with viewport locking and flexbox optimization.

features.name: Oatmeal Design System & Admin Portal UX
features.description: Premium visual consistency with refined executive dashboard aesthetics, prioritised Admin access, and integrated Ngrok administrative tunneling.
features.notes: Optimised tool teleportation to ensure Admin access remains prioritised across all breakpoints.

features.name: Hands-Free Voice Research (STT)
features.description: Integrated en-GB speech recognition with auto-submit protocol for seamless conversational research.

features.name: Premium Voice Feedback (TTS)
features.description: Automated text-to-speech engine using Google Premium voices with markdown-stripping for natural auditory feedback.

features.name: Voice Interruption Protocol
features.description: Intelligent system logic that automatically cancels AI speech when user voice input is detected.

features.name: Zero Truncation Summary Protocol
features.description: Enforced architectural constraint ensuring full text visibility for conversation summaries through expanded 480px viewport-aware tooltips.

features.name: Subject-Aware Discovery Mechanism
features.description: Dynamic synchronization of 'Suggested Questions' based on the user's active sidebar subject selection, enabling context-specific exploration.

features.name: Architectural Traceability
features.description: Admin Portal feature that maps every UI component to its source file, facilitating rapid maintenance and design parity verification.
